top.name: Sympathy Web
top.rules_text: Create Sympathy Links between ALL your constructs (each linked to its 2 nearest). Enemies crossing any link line take 3 damage. All linked constructs gain +2 damage and share HP pool.

channel.name: Sympathy Web (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also +4 armor to all linked constructs

bottom.name: Clockwork Familiar
bottom.rules_text: Deploy a Familiar on your tile (12HP 3DMG 2SPD). Familiar copies the top half of every spell you cast at half effectiveness targeting nearest enemy. Mobile.

channel.name: Clockwork Familiar (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Full effectiveness instead of half
